definition:
1. like γονή, that which is begotten, offspring, a child , (Iliad by Homer); ὁ Πηλέως γ. his son , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. any product , of the silver mines at Laureion, (Aeschulus Tragicus); of tribute, (Aristophanes Comicus) 
3. ἐς ἔρσενα γόνον to any of the male sex , (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. like γένος, one's race, stock, descent , (Odyssey by Homer) (ML)
